description: High on style, this pair of Fast Jacket sunglasses from oakley comes in a styled frame. An eclectic mixture of fashion and substance, its shape provides that perfect Fit over the root of your nose. The glasses are enclosed in a velveteen pouch. Lens size: 55 mm Warranty: 1 year Tinted Plutonite lens with 100% UVA, UVB and UVC protection and harmful blue light upto 400nm Has Oakley Iridium leans coating to reduce glare and improve contrast Stylised plastic frame in an aerodynamic design for absolute comfort and durability Square lens for absolute style and protection from elements Flexible hinges for durability Fixed nose holder with a thick nose bridge which is part of the frame to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skin Care Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth provided Remove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner Do not use your fingers on such stains Do not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car
